sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, event_time DateTime, duration IntervalNanosecond) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (1, toDateTime('2024-06-15 10:00:00'), toIntervalNanosecond(500000000));
UPDATE test_intervals SET duration = toIntervalNanosecond(1000000000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT event_time + duration AS new_event_time FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, duration, event_time + duration AS adjusted_time FROM test_intervals;
